description: Chemical wash, sanding, filling grain, applying high-durability primer, and spraying two coats of cabinet-grade enamel paint.
Leveling, scribing, mounting stock/semi-custom cabinet boxes, fastening to wall studs, and aligning doors/drawers.
Precision fitting of bespoke solid hardwood storage units, integrated toe-kicks, and premium soft-close crown detailing.
Scribing mitered joints, sealing seams, cutout out sink hole, and securing top to cabinet boxes.
Precision cutout, sealing end grain, gluing joints, sanding smooth, and treating wood with mineral oils.
On-site template creation, diamond-saw wet cutting, profiling edges, undermounting sink clips, and epoxy bonding seams.
Laying vapor barriers, cutting planks, snapping click-lock joints, rolling floor, and installing expansion moldings.
Mortar bed leveling, spreading thin-set adhesive, laying large tiles with leveling clips, and hand-rubbing grout joints.
Acclimatizing premium hardwood boards, pneumatic secret nailing, floor sanding, applying low-VOC clear matte sealer coats.
Taping off trims, filling nail holes, texturing patches, and applying one primer coat with two premium wall colors.
Prepping drywall backer, running laser lines, manual tile cutting, tile layout in staggered pattern, and grout wiping.
Drilling electrical outlets in solid quartz slabs, hoisting heavy pieces, and mounting vertical back-splashes flush to wall.
Connecting hot/cold shutoff valves, linking drain traps, mounting faucets, and hooking up sink basket drains.
Core drilling foundation slabs, re-routing water delivery lines, venting drains, and testing pressure-tight gas pipe joints.
Uncrating appliances, leveling refrigerator, connecting dishwasher water/drain, and plugging in electric range.
Fishing copper Romex wiring through ceiling joists, cutting holes, mounting junction boxes, and wiring dimmer switches.
Installing smart multi-pole switches, setting up central smart home bridges, programming light scenes, and app sync.
Building curb framing, sealing mud-pan liners, installing cement boards, applying liquid waterproof membranes, and layout tiling.
Scribing cabinet backs, fastening vanity to wall studs, mounting top, and caulking joints.
Miter cutting crown molding angles, installing thick baseboards, capping window casings, and wood filler prep.
Removing old cabinets/counters safely, stripping floor adhesive, sweeping studs, hauling heavy items to dumpsters.

job: Structural Wall Removal with Header Steel
description: Erecting temporary structural walls, dropping studs, framing double LVL headers or steel beams, and post anchoring.
Installing 200A main service panel, driving grounding rods, running heavy copper mains, and wiring smart safety breakers.
Digging deep holes, pouring concrete piles, mounting heavy support posts, leveling joist frames, and structural strapping.
